headline: Dubai seeks normalcy at all cost after a month of war
description: Due to its economic importance and its proximity to Israel, the United Arab Emirates has become a target for Iran. Yet in the wealthy city-state, it is not so much missiles, but the economic threat that worries the population.

headline: Israel turns its back on France as Paris struggles to maintain dialogue
Astronauts strapped in for NASA's historic lunar launch
Palestinians voice anxiety and anger over Israeli law introducing death penalty
description: The law introducing the death penalty for Palestinians accused of deadly anti-Israeli attacks, condemned by Palestinian authorities and human rights organizations, has sparked a strong backlash. A call for a general strike was issued on Wednesday in East Jerusalem and the West Bank.

headline: Pesticides and cancer: For the first time, researchers find a connection at the national level
description: French researchers have developed a model to map pesticide exposure across Peru to reported cancer clusters. They demonstrate a 'robust spatial association' between these chemicals and increased cancer incidence rates in over 400 areas.

headline: 'The Drama': A marriage tested by unsettling truths
description: Zendaya, radiating vulnerability, and Robert Pattinson, perpetually awkward, deliver an endearing portrayal of a couple whose relationship is about to be shattered by unexpected revelations.

headline: Mystery among the gorillas: Who killed Dian Fossey?
description: More than 40 years after the murder of the primatologist at her camp in Rwanda, the existence of a piece of evidence, possibly kept in a laboratory of the French police, could revive the investigation.

headline: Trump attends Supreme Court hearing on ending birthright citizenship

War is transforming Ukraine's dogs who live on the front line
description: Canines found near combat zones are small, light and dark-colored, according to a study. These characteristics have helped them survive in a hostile environment.

headline: Céline Dion picks Paris for her return to the stage after a six-year hiatus
description: After several days of hints, the Canadian star waited for her birthday to announce her first concert dates since 2020: She will be in residence for 10 nights at Paris La Défense Arena, between September 12 and October 14.

headline: Ukraine strikes Russia's lifeblood by targeting oil ports
description: Long-range Ukrainian drones hit three key infrastructures for Russian crude oil exports, as Kyiv aims to limit Moscow's windfall from surging oil prices.
